title: The Shawshank Redemption
description: 'The Shawshank Redemption' is a tale of enduring hope and friendship. Wrongfully convicted for the murder of his wife and her lover, banker Andy Dufresne is sentenced to life at Shawshank Prison. There he develops a unique bond with longtime inmate Red, who procures items for the other inmates. Despite his seemingly dire circumstances, Andy maintains his innocence and keeps hope alive.
hints: 4. 🕊️🎒📚🔨 - Knowledge and courage behind the mask
breakdown: • 👨‍⚖️🔨📖 - Represents the unjust sentence given to Andy Dufresne

• 💰🍻💭🔓 - Signifies the celebration by Red in memory of Andy after his escape
• ⏳🎶🌹 - Represents the enduring power of art and music within the prison
• 🚶‍♂️💼💵 - Shows the unexpected inheritance left by Andy

• 💥🚿🌦️ - Connotes the shocking revelation of Andy's escape
• 🗽👫⛵ - Illustrates Red's journey to reunite with Andy, fulfilling his dream of freedom.

title: The Dark Knight
description: In 'The Dark Knight', Batman, with the help of Jim Gordon and new district attorney Harvey Dent, is set to dismantle the remaining criminal organizations that plague Gotham. However, a new psychotic criminal known as the Joker emerges who thrusts Gotham into anarchy and forces Batman closer to crossing the fine line between hero and vigilante.
hints: 12. 🦇🌃 - A hero emerges from the shadows.

• 💥🃏 - Portrays the explosive encounters between Batman and the Joker.

title: Inception
description: Inception follows Dom Cobb, a professional thief who steals information by infiltrating people's subconscious. Cobb gets a chance at redemption and to return to his old life when he is offered an impossible task: to plant an idea into a person's mind, an act known as "inception". In a world where dreams can be manipulated and controlled, Cobb and his team must succeed against all odds.
hints: 5. 🏃‍♂️💡 - A race to implement an idea.

title: Forrest Gump
description: Forrest Gump is a kind-hearted man from Alabama with low intelligence but has incredible good fortune. He witnesses and influences many defining historical events in the 20th century while pursuing his life-long love, Jenny.

title: Star Wars
description: Star Wars is an epic science fiction saga set in a distant galaxy. It follows the journey of Luke Skywalker, a young farm boy who gets caught up in a galactic rebellion against the tyrannical Empire. With help from Obi-Wan Kenobi, Princess Leia, Han Solo, and other allies, Luke becomes a Jedi and confronts the evil Darth Vader and Emperor Palpatine.

title: Gladiator
description: Gladiator revolves around Maximus Decimus Meridius, a brave general who is betrayed when the King's corrupt son, Commodus, murders his father and seizes the throne. Taken into slavery and presumed dead, Maximus rises as a gladiator to seek revenge in the gladiatorial arenas.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
description: In The Silence of the Lambs, FBI trainee Clarice Starling seeks help from imprisoned serial killer Hannibal Lecter to catch another killer, Buffalo Bill. Dealing with her own past along the way, Clarice’s journey dives deep into the human psyche, horror, and suspense.

title: The Wolf of Wall Street
description: The Wolf of Wall Street is a biographical crime film about the life of Jordan Belfort, a stockbroker in Wall Street. It traces his rise to wealth and indulgence in the high life, his involvement in widespread corruption, and his eventual downfall involving crime, corruption, and the federal government.

title: Finding Nemo
description: Finding Nemo is an animated adventure movie that tells the story of Marlin, a clown fish, who embarks on a journey across the ocean to find his son Nemo who has been captured by a diver and placed in a fish tank. With the help of a forgetful but lovable fish named Dory, Marlin faces various challenges and learns important lessons about love, courage, and the bond between a parent and child.

title: Toy Story

title: Back to the Future

title: The Matrix
description: The Matrix tells the story of Thomas A. Anderson, who lives a double life as a corporate employee by day and hacker by night, known as Neo. After a series of mysterious encounters, he discovers the truth that the world he perceives is actually a simulated reality called the Matrix and he is destined to lead the rebellion against its creators.

title: Pulp Fiction
description: Pulp Fiction intertwines the lives of two mob hit men, a boxer, a gangster's wife, and a pair of low-rent criminals over a few days. Comprising multiple narrative sequences with a nonlinear plot and woven with crime, murder, redemption, drugs, and comical encounters, the movie showcases Quentin Tarantino's unconventional storytelling style.

title: Die Hard
description: Die Hard is an action-packed film that follows the story of New York Police Detective John McClane. Unexpectedly, he ends up in an LA skyscraper during a Christmas party while it's overtaken by terrorists. With everyone else held hostage, McClane fights back, using his wits and resourcefulness against the gang, hoping to foil their plot and save the hostages, which include his estranged wife.

title: Avengers: Infinity War
description: In Avengers: Infinity War, the Avengers and the Guardians of the Galaxy come together to prevent the mad titan Thanos from collecting all six Infinity Stones. The stones would grant him the power to wipe out half of all life in the universe. The heroes engage in epic battles across different planets, but in a devastating turn of events, Thanos achieves his goal, resulting in half of all life, including many beloved heroes, turning to dust.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
description: 'The Fellowship of the Ring' is the first film in 'The Lord of the Rings' trilogy. It tells the tale of the unassuming Frodo Baggins who inherits a ring from his elderly cousin Bilbo. This is no ordinary ring, as it is revealed to be the One Ring, a powerful artifact that the Dark Lord Sauron wants to regain and use to enslave the world of Middle-earth. Frodo, along with his friends and a fellowship of races including Elves, Dwarves, and Men, embarks on a critical mission to Mount Doom to destroy the ring and crush the growing threat of shadow and despair.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
description: The Two Towers, the second installment in The Lord of the Rings trilogy, follows the separated fellowship as they fight their battles. Frodo and Sam continue their dangerous journey towards Mount Doom, guided by the treacherous Gollum. Meanwhile, Aragorn, Legolas, and Gimli join the defense of Rohan, and Merry and Pippin have adventures of their own with the Ents of Fangorn Forest.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King

Meanwhile, Aragorn recognizes his true destiny as king and must rally forces to fight against Sauron's army at the Battle of Gondor.

title: Goodfellas
description: Goodfellas is a crime film that tells the story of mob associate Henry Hill and his partners in crime Jimmy Conway and Tommy DeVito. The film follows their rise in the mob hierarchy and the heists they pull off, while also showcasing their personal lives and relationships. Despite their successful run, the partnership begins to unravel as greed, paranoia, and drug addiction take its toll.

title: No Country for Old Men
description: In No Country for Old Men, Llewellyn Moss, a hunter, stumbles upon a drug deal gone wrong and takes a suitcase full of money. This makes him the target of a psychotic killer, Anton Chigurh, who uses any means necessary, including a cattle gun, to track down Moss. With Sheriff Bell attempting to protect Moss and make sense of the escalating violence, the film unfolds as a tense, merciless chase in the landscape of Texas.

The movie tells the chilling story of their fight against this evil force, symbolizing internal and external pressures that influence human behavior.

title: Se7en

The fight club evolves into a chaotic anarchistic group called Project Mayhem aiming to break down societal order.

title: The Prestige

The deeper they delve into the world of magic, the more dangerous their rivalry becomes, ultimately leading to deadly consequences.

title: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl
description: Captain Jack Sparrow arrives in Port Royal and quickly lands himself in jail. Meanwhile, the cursed crew of the Black Pearl attack the city and kidnap Elizabeth Swann, mistress of Governor Swann and secret possessor of a pirate medallion. Jack plots an audacious escape, teams up with Will Turner and sets off on a mission to rescue her and reclaim his ship while confronting his cursed former first mate along the way.
